name: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc.
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. is a global media and entertainment company that creates and distributes content across television, film, streaming, and interactive gaming. Its portfolio includes linear TV networks, streaming services, and a content library. The company operates across multiple segments and derives revenue from advertising, distribution, and content licensing, with products spanning news, sports, entertainment, and direct-to-consumer streaming offerings.

products.name: Streaming Services (Max)
products.description: Direct-to-consumer streaming platform offering entertainment, news, and sports content on ad-supported and subscription tiers.

products.name: Linear Television Networks
products.description: Portfolio of domestic and international linear cable and broadcast TV networks delivering news, sports, and entertainment programming.

products.name: Feature Films
products.description: Production and distribution of theatrical feature films under the Warner Bros. film studio.

products.name: Interactive Gaming
products.description: Development and distribution of interactive entertainment and video game products.

products.name: Sports Programming
products.description: Live sports content distributed via linear networks and streaming platforms.

partnerships.description: Proposed merger in which PSKY will acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc.; transaction pending regulatory and stockholder approvals.
